name: loomcycle
description: Drive a loomcycle agentic runtime from inside Claude Code — spawn/cancel/list runs, snapshot, evaluate, inspect memory, mint multi-tenant operator tokens, and import .claude/ repos, all via slash commands and skills over loomcycle's bundled MCP server.

bin_path.title: loomcycle binary path
bin_path.description: Path to the loomcycle binary. Leave as 'loomcycle' to use PATH lookup.

config_path.title: loomcycle.yaml path
config_path.description: Path to your loomcycle config. Relative paths resolve against the project directory.

auth_token.title: LOOMCYCLE_AUTH_TOKEN
auth_token.description: Bearer token for loomcycle's /v1/* endpoints. Stored in your OS keychain, never in the repo.

base_url.title: loomcycle base URL
base_url.description: Base URL of a running loomcycle instance, used by the optional auto-snapshot hook (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8787).
